records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-there are white monsters coming down from the sky...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-there are white monsters coming down from the sky...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-there are white monsters coming down from the sky...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, those aren't monsters...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, those aren't monsters...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, those aren't monsters...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those are angels that have come down from heaven to save us...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those are angels that have come down from heaven to save us...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those are angels that have come down from heaven to save us...!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Oh, angels! Please forgive our sin
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Oh, angels! Please forgive our sin
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Oh, angels! Please forgive our sin
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: The London fog has turned red...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The London fog has turned red...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The London fog has turned red...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want to tell them not to breathe it in too much, but...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want to tell them not to breathe it in too much, but...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want to tell them not to breathe it in too much, but...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is nothing I can do when we are running like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is nothing I can do when we are running like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is nothing I can do when we are running like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My skin...!! It's rotting black...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: My skin...!! It's rotting black...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: My skin...!! It's rotting black...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Agh... AAAARGH...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Agh... AAAARGH...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Agh... AAAARGH...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The people are turning into monsters..!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The people are turning into monsters..!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The people are turning into monsters..!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't look back, Swan. Just keep running...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't look back, Swan. Just keep running...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't look back, Swan. Just keep running...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: M-monsters...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: M-monsters...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: M-monsters...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: My friend! Leave this place to me and go!
records.m_Talk_DEU: My friend! Leave this place to me and go!
records.m_Talk_FRA: My friend! Leave this place to me and go!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Watson!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Watson!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Watson!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have a duty!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have a duty!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have a duty!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you have a truth that needs to be told to that girl you've been searching for all this time...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you have a truth that needs to be told to that girl you've been searching for all this time...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you have a truth that needs to be told to that girl you've been searching for all this time...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, go! Quickly!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, go! Quickly!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, go! Quickly!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...All right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...All right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...All right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't forget, Watson. I am a true friend of yours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't forget, Watson. I am a true friend of yours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't forget, Watson. I am a true friend of yours.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How much further do we have to go?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How much further do we have to go?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How much further do we have to go?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just a little more. We're almost there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just a little more. We're almost there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just a little more. We're almost there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is it, Swan?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is it, Swan?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is it, Swan?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know, but the red fog that was covering the entire city just vanished.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know, but the red fog that was covering the entire city just vanished.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know, but the red fog that was covering the entire city just vanished.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And those gigantic white monsters aren't following us anymore. Maybe the situation there has gotten better?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And those gigantic white monsters aren't following us anymore. Maybe the situation there has gotten better?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And those gigantic white monsters aren't following us anymore. Maybe the situation there has gotten better?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That can't be. Once a world reaches its critical point...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That can't be. Once a world reaches its critical point...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That can't be. Once a world reaches its critical point...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Is this snow? If it is snowing in this weather...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Is this snow? If it is snowing in this weather...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Is this snow? If it is snowing in this weather...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? Look. Abberline! The sky...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? Look. Abberline! The sky...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? Look. Abberline! The sky...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't look up...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't look up...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't look up...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The immortals continue to gather following the stench of the plague.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The immortals continue to gather following the stench of the plague.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The immortals continue to gather following the stench of the plague.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unusual, however, to see those who were once Antagonists being drawn to the world's end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unusual, however, to see those who were once Antagonists being drawn to the world's end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unusual, however, to see those who were once Antagonists being drawn to the world's end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, this is where she will descend...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, this is where she will descend...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, this is where she will descend...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thagirion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My sister...
records.m_Talk_DEU: My sister...
records.m_Talk_FRA: My sister...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have gathered all the Stigmatas from the despicable ones of this world just for me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have gathered all the Stigmatas from the despicable ones of this world just for me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have gathered all the Stigmatas from the despicable ones of this world just for me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And lastly, you offered your heart to me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And lastly, you offered your heart to me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And lastly, you offered your heart to me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I could not be any happier.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I could not be any happier.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I could not be any happier.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you listening?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you listening?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you listening?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, right. My sister of this world is without a heart...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, right. My sister of this world is without a heart...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, right. My sister of this world is without a heart...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I shall sew your pain with this thread.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I shall sew your pain with this thread.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I shall sew your pain with this thread.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will reassemble your broken arms, legs, heart, and bones.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will reassemble your broken arms, legs, heart, and bones.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will reassemble your broken arms, legs, heart, and bones.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>So now, live only for me, my sister.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>So now, live only for me, my sister.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>So now, live only for me, my sister.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Only look at me and listen to my words.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Only look at me and listen to my words.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Only look at me and listen to my words.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>And...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>And...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>And...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Become my personal string instrument and play me your melody.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Become my personal string instrument and play me your melody.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Become my personal string instrument and play me your melody.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: As you command, my queen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you command, my queen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you command, my queen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, no. I am being ambushed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, no. I am being ambushed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, no. I am being ambushed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems Her Eminence has already arrived.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems Her Eminence has already arrived.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems Her Eminence has already arrived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Long time no see, Your Eminence. How have you been?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Long time no see, Your Eminence. How have you been?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Long time no see, Your Eminence. How have you been?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How odd, Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How odd, Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How odd, Thagirion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I remember your heart being pierced with one strike.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I remember your heart being pierced with one strike.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I remember your heart being pierced with one strike.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is no beating in your chest. How is this possible?
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is no beating in your chest. How is this possible?
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is no beating in your chest. How is this possible?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is because I do not make the same mistake twice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is because I do not make the same mistake twice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is because I do not make the same mistake twice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, you would have targeted my heart as well, so you know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, you would have targeted my heart as well, so you know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, you would have targeted my heart as well, so you know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>That there is no second chance.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>That there is no second chance.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>That there is no second chance.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Urgh...! RRRRRRAAAAGH...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Urgh...! RRRRRRAAAAGH...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Urgh...! RRRRRRAAAAGH...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is a delicacy to hear the screams of someone who was once called the Great Silence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is a delicacy to hear the screams of someone who was once called the Great Silence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is a delicacy to hear the screams of someone who was once called the Great Silence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was a wise choice to keep you in that prison. It makes your beautiful voice ring clearer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was a wise choice to keep you in that prison. It makes your beautiful voice ring clearer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was a wise choice to keep you in that prison. It makes your beautiful voice ring clearer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, I'll reassemble your core and make you a <color=#ffd34c>sister</color> as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, I'll reassemble your core and make you a <color=#ffd34c>sister</color> as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, I'll reassemble your core and make you a <color=#ffd34c>sister</color> as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Urgh!! THAGIRION...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Urgh!! THAGIRION...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Urgh!! THAGIRION...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our next meet...! I shall end this vicious cycle and complete my atonement...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our next meet...! I shall end this vicious cycle and complete my atonement...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our next meet...! I shall end this vicious cycle and complete my atonement...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you get tired of that word, "atonement?"
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you get tired of that word, "atonement?"
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you get tired of that word, "atonement?"

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why don't you know? The moment you vow for next time, you have already lost.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why don't you know? The moment you vow for next time, you have already lost.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why don't you know? The moment you vow for next time, you have already lost.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have resigned from reality, Your Eminence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have resigned from reality, Your Eminence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have resigned from reality, Your Eminence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then again, it might be better for you to remain a bystander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then again, it might be better for you to remain a bystander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then again, it might be better for you to remain a bystander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With Her Eminence's retreat, the insignificant losers are starting to gather.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With Her Eminence's retreat, the insignificant losers are starting to gather.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With Her Eminence's retreat, the insignificant losers are starting to gather.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But dealing with those guardians who have nothing left but their tenacity is also a rule of this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But dealing with those guardians who have nothing left but their tenacity is also a rule of this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But dealing with those guardians who have nothing left but their tenacity is also a rule of this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I should leave this to my new sister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I should leave this to my new sister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I should leave this to my new sister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As you wish.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you wish.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you wish.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is it that you command, my queen?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is it that you command, my queen?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is it that you command, my queen?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They say the one who wants to be born must first destroy a world first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They say the one who wants to be born must first destroy a world first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They say the one who wants to be born must first destroy a world first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, I want you to destroy your own world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, I want you to destroy your own world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, I want you to destroy your own world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As the Midnight Killer, kill all the humans and leave no one behind in this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As the Midnight Killer, kill all the humans and leave no one behind in this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As the Midnight Killer, kill all the humans and leave no one behind in this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Subjugate the end of this world to my Qlipha Dimension.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Subjugate the end of this world to my Qlipha Dimension.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Subjugate the end of this world to my Qlipha Dimension.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that I will regain my original strength.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that I will regain my original strength.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that I will regain my original strength.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As you command.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you command.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you command.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...My beloved little sister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...My beloved little sister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...My beloved little sister.

root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>So now, live only for me, my sister.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>So now, live only for me, my sister.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Only look at me and listen to my words.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Only look at me and listen to my words.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Only look at me and listen to my words.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>And...</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>And...</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>And...</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Become my personal string instrument and play me your melody.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Become my personal string instrument and play me your melody.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Become my personal string instrument and play me your melody.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: As you command, my queen.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As you command, my queen.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As you command, my queen.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, no. I am being ambushed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, no. I am being ambushed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, no. I am being ambushed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems Her Eminence has already arrived.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems Her Eminence has already arrived.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems Her Eminence has already arrived.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Long time no see, Your Eminence. How have you been?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Long time no see, Your Eminence. How have you been?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Long time no see, Your Eminence. How have you been?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How odd, Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How odd, Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How odd, Thagirion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I remember your heart being pierced with one strike.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I remember your heart being pierced with one strike.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I remember your heart being pierced with one strike.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is no beating in your chest. How is this possible?
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is no beating in your chest. How is this possible?
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is no beating in your chest. How is this possible?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is because I do not make the same mistake twice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is because I do not make the same mistake twice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is because I do not make the same mistake twice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, you would have targeted my heart as well, so you know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, you would have targeted my heart as well, so you know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, you would have targeted my heart as well, so you know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>That there is no second chance.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>That there is no second chance.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>That there is no second chance.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Urgh...! RRRRRRAAAAGH...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Urgh...! RRRRRRAAAAGH...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Urgh...! RRRRRRAAAAGH...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is a delicacy to hear the screams of someone who was once called the Great Silence.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is a delicacy to hear the screams of someone who was once called the Great Silence.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is a delicacy to hear the screams of someone who was once called the Great Silence.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was a wise choice to keep you in that prison. It makes your beautiful voice ring clearer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was a wise choice to keep you in that prison. It makes your beautiful voice ring clearer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was a wise choice to keep you in that prison. It makes your beautiful voice ring clearer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, I'll reassemble your core and make you a <color=#ffd34c>sister</color> as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, I'll reassemble your core and make you a <color=#ffd34c>sister</color> as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, I'll reassemble your core and make you a <color=#ffd34c>sister</color> as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Urgh!! THAGIRION...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Urgh!! THAGIRION...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Urgh!! THAGIRION...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our next meet...! I shall end this vicious cycle and complete my atonement...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our next meet...! I shall end this vicious cycle and complete my atonement...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our next meet...! I shall end this vicious cycle and complete my atonement...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you get tired of that word, "atonement?"
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you get tired of that word, "atonement?"
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you get tired of that word, "atonement?"

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why don't you know? The moment you vow for next time, you have already lost.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why don't you know? The moment you vow for next time, you have already lost.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why don't you know? The moment you vow for next time, you have already lost.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You have resigned from reality, Your Eminence.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You have resigned from reality, Your Eminence.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You have resigned from reality, Your Eminence.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then again, it might be better for you to remain a bystander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then again, it might be better for you to remain a bystander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then again, it might be better for you to remain a bystander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With Her Eminence's retreat, the insignificant losers are starting to gather.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With Her Eminence's retreat, the insignificant losers are starting to gather.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With Her Eminence's retreat, the insignificant losers are starting to gather.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But dealing with those guardians who have nothing left but their tenacity is also a rule of this world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But dealing with those guardians who have nothing left but their tenacity is also a rule of this world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But dealing with those guardians who have nothing left but their tenacity is also a rule of this world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I should leave this to my new sister.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I should leave this to my new sister.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I should leave this to my new sister.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As you wish.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As you wish.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As you wish.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is it that you command, my queen?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is it that you command, my queen?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is it that you command, my queen?

root.m_Talk_ENG: They say the one who wants to be born must first destroy a world first.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They say the one who wants to be born must first destroy a world first.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They say the one who wants to be born must first destroy a world first.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, I want you to destroy your own world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, I want you to destroy your own world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, I want you to destroy your own world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As the Midnight Killer, kill all the humans and leave no one behind in this world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As the Midnight Killer, kill all the humans and leave no one behind in this world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As the Midnight Killer, kill all the humans and leave no one behind in this world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Subjugate the end of this world to my Qlipha Dimension.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Subjugate the end of this world to my Qlipha Dimension.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Subjugate the end of this world to my Qlipha Dimension.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So that I will regain my original strength.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So that I will regain my original strength.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So that I will regain my original strength.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As you command.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As you command.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As you command.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...My beloved little sister.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...My beloved little sister.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...My beloved little sister.
